artifact_role: Coverage ledger for the construction-space exploration program. Cells are construction families on the six-axis template; rung grades are per sector track. This file changes no claim status or verdict.

rung_semantics.R0: consistency: not falsified by the track's frozen sharp constraint list; imports permitted but typed
rung_semantics.R1: hosting: accommodates the track's structures with typed AND counted imports (import_count reported)
rung_semantics.R2: native selection: structure forced by the construction without sector-specific repair (North Star bar; grades survivors only)
rung_semantics.R0_FAIL: falsified against the sharp constraint list at consistency strength; boundary data carving the map
rung_semantics.OPEN: not yet examined at this rung; prior derivation-strength kills do NOT settle R0/R1
rung_semantics.GATED: examination blocked on a named dependency
rung_semantics.R0_COND: consistency conditional on the frozen source-object interface contract (typed import); integration validates when a concrete instance arrives
rung_semantics.R1_COND: hosting conditional on the frozen source-object interface contract, imports typed and counted including the interface itself

retro_grading_note: Initial grades are retro-read from existing evidence at register/canon pointers. Every retro grade carries verification_needed: true until an hourly probe confirms it against the frozen constraint list. Prior BOUNDED_NO_GO results were derivation-strength (R2) kills; they are recorded as boundary data and do not settle R0/R1.

preregistered_endings.summary: Empty joint R0 intersection means the predeclared construction class failed the frozen sharp lists, not a global GU verdict. A survivor means existence at the recorded minimum rung with typed imports; only R2 supports native unification.

source_object_interface_contract.summary: P5 froze the four-leg source-object interface contract as a typed import: GR trace-free vacuum-support slot, QM physical-sector certificates, COSMO scalar-channel certificates, and SM source-owned selector certificates. No source instance exists; p2c routing is parent/daily-steward follow-up.

conditional_interior_probe.summary: P6 used the frozen P5 source-object interface as one typed import to grade first conditional interior cells without claiming a source instance. C4 remains gated on an actual p2c packet. C9-GR, C6-SM, C7-COSMO, and C8-COSMO are conditionally consistent only under one shared source object with frozen normalizations and no per-sector retuning.

conditional_corridors.first_falsification_test: A single shared source identity, branch assumptions, normalization ledger, loss ledger, import count, and rollback rule must satisfy all four legs without hidden sector-specific retuning.

SM: gauge anomaly cancellation for the surviving spectrum
chirality production (left-right asymmetric fermion content realizable)
three generations without per-generation adjustable structure
absolute hypercharge normalization consistent with electric charges
physical Higgs sector with electroweak breaking
complete surviving spectrum matches observed content
extra/mirror mode decoupling at accessible energies
QM: physical state space via a well-defined quotient
observables as operators on that space
locality/causal structure compatible with the pairing and causal-order axes
no negative-norm physical states after constraint discharge
GR: a vacuum sector in which the Q^TF(B) obstruction is cancelled or structurally evaded (vacuum-supported source, or different residual bookkeeping)
preservation of the linear cheap-read clears (Schwarzschild and Kerr linear-in-M residuals remain zero)
no target-shaped stress import (standard Einstein dynamics stays comparator-only)
COSMO: a physical scalar channel with a gauge-invariant projector
an observable map to expansion/perturbation quantities
a closed SVT quadratic truncation with dischargeable non-scalar residues

cells.family: Frozen W229 record-sourced induced-YM nonlocal branch (the tested construction)
cells.axis_notes: Fully specified per the recovery manifest; the only cell with a complete Layer0+L1-L7 signature.

SM.note: P3 verified: R2 BOUNDED_NO_GO (no native selector); R1 hosting evidence (Pati-Salam/Spin(10) + relative arithmetic) is real only with six typed imports.

QM.note: P4 verified: the current branch clears only conditional hosting with one typed adapter import; quotient, state, observable, probability, locality, and dynamics certificates remain absent natively.

GR.note: Vacuum source vanishes (Psi=0 -> J=0 -> theta=0); zero tensor cannot cancel nonzero Q^TF(B). Fails the sharp list at consistency strength. Binding constraint of this family.

COSMO.note: P3 verified: no physical scalar projector, gauge-invariant observable map, or closed SVT truncation/residue discharge exists in the current W229 branch, so it fails COSMO R0 at consistency strength.

cells.family: W203 ultralocal limit of the record-current branch
cells.axis_notes: Shares C1 signature except locality of the source law (L4/L6 delta).

SM.note: Presumed to inherit C1 hosting; not independently examined.

GR.note: P3 verified: inherits C1's same zero-source obstruction because W203 keeps the record-current Psi=0 -> J=0 source law unless a different non-record source is supplied.

cells.family: Fundamental-stiffness / bare-theta branch (theta as fundamental field, not record-sourced)
cells.axis_notes: L1/L6 delta from C1: source ontology changes; axis template partially UNDERDEFINED.

GR.note: P1 lemma: the current scalar/isotropic bare-theta or fundamental-stiffness seed is in the wrong tensor slot for the trace-free Q^TF(B) residual. A future source-owned bare-theta equation with boundary data, normalization, and trace-free tensor shape remains a new dependency, not current evidence.

COSMO.note: A fundamental theta is also a natural scalar-channel candidate for the COSMO track.

cells.family: Boundary-conditioned adapter constructions (explicit typed adapter assumption)
cells.axis_notes: L2/L7 delta: observer/positivity structure supplied at the boundary.

typed_adapter_interface.interface_role: typed import for C1-QM and construction target for P5-SOURCE-OBJECT-SPEC
must_supply: adapter provenance independent of the GU consequence it enables
physical field complex or exact source-defined quotient interface
positive-majorant or spectral-section interface sufficient to test state positivity
explicit branch assumptions and non-retuning conditions
must_not_supply: claim of quantum recovery by assumption

SM.note: Standing axiom 2026-07-19: gate holds ONLY for unconditional validation; conditional R0_COND/R1_COND work proceeds now.

cells.axis_notes: L2/L3 delta from C1: selector built from observer-section data.

SM.note: P2 harness: the current Pati-Salam/Spin(10) host seed has real relative anomaly and hypercharge arithmetic, but fails SM R0 because no source-owned target-free selector, native three-generation mechanism, physical Higgs sector, complete spectrum theorem, or extra-mode decoupling is present. The harness remains reusable for future source-owned selector packets.

GR.note: Presumed to inherit C1's source law unless combined with C3/C9; combination cells created on demand.

cells.axis_notes: L5 delta: breaking/chirality as emergent from source dynamics; largely UNDERDEFINED.

SM.note: P6 conditional interior: source-owned breaking is conditionally consistent at SM R0 only if the same source object supplies target-free selector, chirality, three generations, absolute hypercharge normalization, physical Higgs sector, complete spectrum, and decoupling. No concrete source instance exists.

cells.family: Gauge-invariant / constrained composite scalar from frozen GU fields
cells.axis_notes: L3/L5 delta: scalar as composite of existing sectors.

COSMO.note: P6 conditional interior: a composite scalar is conditionally consistent at COSMO R0 only if the same source object binds a physical scalar projector, observable map, closed SVT quadratic truncation, and residue discharge. No concrete source instance exists.

cells.family: Scalar induced by mixing among already-present GU sectors

COSMO.note: P6 conditional interior: mixed-sector scalar routes are conditionally consistent at COSMO R0 only if the mixing rule is frozen before target comparison and shares the source-object normalization/loss ledger. No concrete source instance exists.

cells.family: Ambient-curvature / H-class balance mechanisms for the Willmore residual
cells.axis_notes: L1/L7 delta: residual bookkeeping uses ambient or H-class structure.

GR.integration_gate: concrete p2c packet with source-owned higher-codimension first variation plus coefficient frozen before Schwarzschild/Kerr target use
GR.note: P6 conditional interior: C9 is conditionally consistent at GR R0 only if the same source object supplies the ambient/H-class first variation or equivalent trace-free source tensor and freezes its coefficient before target use. No concrete source instance exists.

cells.family: Theta distortion (parameterized torsion) as the vacuum-response field replacing the Lambda-times-metric slot (transcript-anchored)
cells.axis_notes: L1/L6/L7 delta from C1: field content of the vacuum response changes; equivariance-derived divergence-freeness; VEV-capable. Provenance: papers/drafts/Transcript into the impossible.md [00:22:26]-[00:27:00].

SM.note: CH-SM swing: metric-type VEV forces Spin(10)->PS; 16 chains R0-equivalent; range 16->6 conditional on H-GR-prime; rank drop spinorial (126 route, matter parity).

QM.note: CH-QM toy: right orientation passes all six certificates; wrong fails cohomologically; bit J_quat-commuting (no generations).

GR.note: P-K2 verdict PARTIAL leaning theorem: artifact mode defeated (coefficient never gauge-dependent; c=1 rigid across the harmonic class, both backgrounds); true hypothesis is gauge-invariant Ricci-flatness with the de Donder presentation class as named construction data (new shadow demand on DEM-GR-3: the source action must derive or own the presentation); K2/K5 UNIFIED (matter defect = -[<Ric.bhat>]^TF exactly); full covariant t2-slot lock dead by the 4D Lanczos no-go; C2 law and Noether identity survive covariantization.

COSMO.note: CH-COSMO swing: projector constructed, helicity-0 automatic, one slicing residue; multi-scalar diagonalization + Z_theta>0 pending C10 action.

cells.family: Cl(7,7) signature realization of the full construction (real class: J'^2 = +1, Kramers wall dissolves; hyperbolic Krein pairing survives per CH-QM certificate)
cells.axis_notes: Layer-0/L1 delta from every (9,5) cell: global signature choice changes the Clifford algebra class. Provenance: CH-QM swing 2026-07-19 exact certificate; canon quaternionic-parity no-go applies to (9,5) only.

SM.note: P-77-REAL-INDEX (builder + adversarial twin, independent paths, unanimous): FREE-INTEGER. Forced-3 fails (no convention-rigid value; 4-8 counts reachable); blocks-3 fails (Schur divisor 1; odd signatures exhibited). Cheap-kill window closed both directions. CAUTION T4: the Kramers wall MOVED, not vanished — base-Clifford-linear carriers still have signature in 8Z; weld must pin carrier base-typing. Advantage over (9,5) is typing-only; generation integer is a free import in BOTH signatures.

QM.note: Port: toy survives verbatim; bit retyped J-prime-sector-exchanging; Gram fork GRAM-PIN-77 to pin.

GR.note: Port: cancellation identity survives EXACTLY under the (7,7)-inducing convention; sign gate intact.

coverage.summary: Fanout integration 2026-07-19 evening: C10 graded R0_COND on GR/COSMO/SM and R1_COND on QM; C11 ported R0/R1_COND on three tracks, SM open pending real-index arithmetic. C1 grades stand; C3 R0_FAIL; C4/C9 gated (conditional work proceeds under the standing axiom). Live construction candidates: C10 (9,5) and C11 (7,7), head-to-head.

council_rounds.mode: inline persona pass (members -> rank -> chairman), Joe-directed session

member_positions.geometer: C9 first: the ambient/H-class balance is a well-posed geometric question and the only structural (non-field-content) escape from Q^TF(B).
member_positions.category_theorist: Type the adapter interface of C4 now so the p2c return lands typed; cheap and removes later rework.
member_positions.statistician: Maximize kill-rate per hour: the SM arithmetic sweep on C5 evaluates many candidates per run; also instrument kill-rates to validate constraint sharpness per the expressiveness guard.
member_positions.computer_scientist: C5 sweep is the only currently scriptable enumeration; automate it before hand-probing single cells.
member_positions.ml_researcher: Treat the map as active learning: probe where posterior uncertainty about joint feasibility is highest, which is R0-GR on C3/C9 since GR is the binding constraint.
member_positions.condensed_matter_physicist: C3 bare-theta resembles a stiffness/order-parameter background; the R0 check (vacuum support with imported stiffness) is a short calculation.
member_positions.numerical_engineer: C3 R0 and the C5 sweep both reduce to bounded computations runnable in tests/; prefer probes with machine-checkable outputs.
member_positions.logician: Freeze constraint-list semantics before any pass so R0_FAIL is well-defined; confirm C1-COSMO retro-fail against the list rather than inheriting the R2 language.
member_positions.optimization_theorist: The joint intersection is empty iff the GR track is empty (its live set is smallest: C3, C9, gated C4). Resolve the smallest feasible set first; everything else is secondary.
member_positions.historian: GUT-era model space died by arithmetic (anomalies, proton decay), which argues the SM sweep will genuinely kill cells; but binding-constraint logic still favors GR-first.

ranked_search_plan.what: Examine C3 (bare-theta vacuum support with imported stiffness) and C9 (ambient/H-class balance) against the GR sharp list at consistency strength; machine-checkable residual computations where possible.
ranked_search_plan.why: GR is the binding constraint and its live set is smallest; an empty GR track empties the joint intersection (optimization/ML/geometer/condensed-matter consensus).

ranked_search_plan.what: Script the R0 arithmetic sweep over candidate finite algebras/quotients from the Spin(10)/Pati-Salam host: anomaly cancellation, chirality, three generations, hypercharge normalization; emit per-candidate pass/fail into tests/.
ranked_search_plan.why: Highest kill-rate per hour; scriptable; also calibrates SM constraint sharpness (statistician/CS/historian).

ranked_search_plan.what: Confirm the retro grades (C1-SM R1 import count, C1-COSMO R0 status, C2-GR inheritance) against the frozen lists; clear verification_needed flags.
ranked_search_plan.why: Cheap integrity: keeps the map honest before it accumulates weight (logician).

ranked_search_plan.what: Convert the QM CONDITIONAL_FAIL certificate list into the per-cell R0 checklist and type C4's adapter interface for the p2c return.
ranked_search_plan.why: Documentation-grade cost, removes rework when the packet lands (category theorist).

council_rounds.chairman_synthesis: Run P1 and P2 as the opening probes in that order; fold P3 into whichever runs first as its closing step; P4 rides along at documentation cost. Re-convene after P1 or P2 completes, or immediately if the GR track's live set changes size in either direction.

council_rounds.mode: inline persona pass, Joe-directed ad-hoc bench

member_positions.orthodox_professor: The bounded no-gos are the most durable assets. State P1 as a lemma with hypotheses and machine-checked arithmetic ('no bare-theta background in class X cancels Q^TF(B) at O(M^2)'); predeclare the P1 endpoint. R0-with-imports risks repeating GUT-era drift without lemma discipline.
member_positions.heterodox_professor: Young theories fail their strictest test first; the rung reframe is the correction. C9 before C3: bookkeeping change over field addition is closer to GU's geometric spirit. Deeper: re-derive what vacuum means natively (is Psi=0 native or comparator-inherited?) before treating vacuum-support failure as family-wide — a legitimate reframe candidate. Count imports without letting the counter become an orthodoxy stick.
member_positions.commercial_scientist: The map + ladder is the reusable asset. Build P2 as a harness (candidate in, constraint-arithmetic verdict out), not a one-off script; run concurrent with P1 since its kill-rate compounds. 'Surviving set after N sweeps' is a communicable deliverable regardless of outcome.
member_positions.wild_frontier_scientist: Nine cells is a shortlist of the committee's imagination. Generalize P2 into a construction compiler + constraint checker and generate candidates over the axis lattice at scale. Better: invert to constraint-first synthesis — treat the four sharp lists as simultaneous constraints and solve for the construction. Run everything concurrently.
member_positions.philosopher_of_science: Feasible-set characterization is the program's maturation. Guards: (1) freeze import-typing rules before cross-cell N comparisons (Duhem-Quine lives in the counter); (2) pre-register both endings now — empty intersection falsifies the predeclared space, not GU-the-idea, and a survivor supports existence not unification; (3) the real update-maker is a differing prediction handed to Lane 2 the moment any cell reaches joint R1.

ranked_search_plan.what: One page freezing both interpretive commitments: what the program asserts if the joint intersection empties, and what it asserts if a survivor emerges (existence-with-N-imports, not unification). Include frozen import-typing rules.
ranked_search_plan.why: Vaccine against post-hoc goalpost moves in either direction; also freezes the counter semantics cross-cell comparisons depend on (philosopher, orthodox).

ranked_search_plan.what: GR R0 probe in lemma form, C9 (ambient/H-class) before C3 (bare-theta): stated hypotheses, machine-checked residual arithmetic, predeclared endpoint. Includes the native-vacuum sub-question (is Psi=0 native or comparator-inherited?) as an explicit reframe candidate.
ranked_search_plan.why: GR remains the binding constraint; lemma discipline makes either outcome durable; the vacuum sub-question is the one reframe that could move the whole family (orthodox, heterodox).

ranked_search_plan.what: SM arithmetic sweep built as a reusable harness (candidate quotient/algebra in, anomaly/chirality/generations/hypercharge verdict out) in tests/; run concurrent with P1, not after.
ranked_search_plan.why: Kill-rate compounds; the harness is the seed of scaled generation over the axis lattice (commercial, frontier).

council_rounds.chairman_synthesis: Adopt P0 immediately (one page, this or next run), then P1 and P2 concurrently — P1 in lemma form C9-first with the native-vacuum reframe sub-question, P2 as a reusable harness. P5 parked as the round-3 agenda if the map does not move. Convergence: binding-constraint logic holds across all five stances; the amendments are about execution discipline (lemma form, pre-registration, concurrency, harness reuse), not direction.

member_positions.logician: No exhaustion follows from current failures because gated cells remain and R0_FAIL is scoped to current evidence and frozen constraint lists.

ranked_search_plan.what: Write and test the shared source identity, branch assumptions, normalization, loss, import-count, and rollback ledger for P6-CORRIDOR-A across GR, QM, COSMO, and SM.
ranked_search_plan.why: This is the cheapest falsification test for whether P6's conditional corridor is one construction or only sector-specific repair.

ranked_search_plan.what: When p2c returns a concrete packet, validate provenance and plug it into the P5/P6 ledger before any grade upgrade.
ranked_search_plan.why: A real source instance is still required for integration validation.

ranked_search_plan.what: Rerun the SM harness only if P6, P7, or a p2c return supplies a new source-owned selector packet.
ranked_search_plan.why: Avoid duplicating the current C5 host-seed R0 fail.

council_rounds.chairman_synthesis: P6 complete: first conditional interior grades are recorded without source-instance, verdict, claim-status, or public-posture movement. Next handoff is P7 shared-normalization ledger for P6-CORRIDOR-A.

council_rounds.steer: Boundary adapter adopted as standing axiom (lab/process/boundary-adapter-standing-axiom.md); 'needs adapter' banned as a stop reason. Lane 1 work restructured into four hypothesis-guided CHANNELS (drafting-factory pattern): each freezes a parameter card (sector construction parameters + realistic adapter parameters), then an integration barrier flips the lane to integration.

channels.hypothesis: H-QM: adapter transmits one global Z/2 orientation (topologically stored, p2c-style) fixing the Krein sign and d_RS,-1; six P4 certificates follow from the graded quotient.
channels.first_test: Finite graded-quotient toy: right orientation yields positive physical sector, wrong orientation visibly fails; both-work kills the hypothesis.

channels.hypothesis: H-GR: adapter transmits the distortion VEV branch selection + one frozen coefficient; VEV tensor structure supplies trace-free Q^TF(B) cancellation; sign plausibly the H-QM Z/2.
channels.first_test: Formalize C10; compute VEV stress structure: nonzero trace-free Q^TF-slot component for ANY branch, else C10 dies like C3.

channels.hypothesis: H-COSMO: scalar channel is the magnitude mode of the same VEV; adapter transmits the one absolute scale GU provably cannot fix (PRED-NORM-RANK).
channels.first_test: Does the magnitude fluctuation yield a closed SVT scalar truncation with dischargeable residues?

channels.hypothesis: H-SM: selector is VEV-conditioned finite data (subgroup-chain datum + shared scale); chirality follows from VEV-conditioning; generation-count-from-sector-structure explicitly speculative.
channels.first_test: P2 harness on the VEV-conditioned selector candidate across subgroup chains.

council_rounds.integration_barrier: When all four channels freeze parameter cards, Lane 1 updates to INTEGRATION: weld the cards, check shared-payload consistency (target: N<=4 finite package — Z/2 orientation, VEV branch, absolute scale, subgroup datum), and route the sharpened minimal payload to p2c.
council_rounds.chairman_synthesis: Adapter-assumed swing complete: explorations/adapter-assumed-four-leg-swing-2026-07-19.md holds the four hypotheses and first tests. Channels run independently; no channel may stop on 'needs adapter'; each records adapter demands on its parameter card instead.

council_rounds.mode: Joe-directed second big swing + fifth leg + readiness scorecard
council_rounds.steer: Fifth channel CH-REC added (records/entropy/arrow of time): H-REC identifies the arrow, the Krein sign, and the vacuum cancellation sign as ONE transmitted orientation — zero new payload items; kill test is the co-flip check in the finite toy. Deepened: H-GR' curvature-conditioned response kernel (anisotropic VEV escapes the C3 isotropy trap); CH-QM topological storage partially discharges Q4 by construction; CH-COSMO adopts Lane 2 DE audit/tripwire as its data legs; CH-SM gains the alignment-rigidity condition and the varying-constants observational tripwire. Standing readiness surface: lab/process/integration-readiness-scorecard.md (3 questions per leg; integration when all rows YES + payload weld passes).

ranked_search_plan.what: Formalize C10; compute VEV stress on curvature-locked anisotropic, homogeneous, and gradient-dominated sub-branches.
ranked_search_plan.why: Critical path; CH-COSMO and CH-SM conditioning wait on it.

ranked_search_plan.what: Enumerate Spin(10)/Pati-Salam breaking chains; harness-sweep; surviving list = adapter range for the subgroup datum.
ranked_search_plan.why: Zero dependencies; computable now; freezes the first adapter-range item.

ranked_search_plan.what: Run the Lane 2 DE amplitude audit (READY) as CH-COSMO's empirical scale bracket.
ranked_search_plan.why: Zero dependencies; data-facing now.

ranked_search_plan.what: Finite graded-quotient toy with record register: positive-sector test, wrong-orientation kill, local inertness (Q4), and the CH-REC co-flip test.
ranked_search_plan.why: One build serves two channels.

council_rounds.chairman_synthesis: Five channels, N<=4 payload target unchanged (H-REC claims thermodynamics rides free on the Z/2). Two probes runnable immediately with no dependencies; scorecard is the standing readiness surface.

council_rounds.steer: Two integration channels added: CH-SIG-95 and CH-SIG-77. Each consumes ALL leg-channel findings and pushes the full welded construction in its own signature to see which works more cleanly. Each channel is signature-pure internally (K6: silent mid-weld signature switching = the pre-registered mutual-inconsistency ending). Comparison criteria (cleanliness): number of legs that fit; total payload count N; number and severity of forced imports; kill-test survivals; whether any leg is outright broken. The integration barrier becomes: both signature channels report -> comparative verdict surfaced to Joe (verdict-grade signature choice stays Joe-gated).

known_starting_positions.CH-SIG-95: All current leg results computed here. Payload N=5 (Z/2 orientation + VEV branch[deleted->forced] + scale[pinned] + subgroup datum + rank-pin integer for generations). Kramers wall stands; generations only via rank pin.
known_starting_positions.CH-SIG-77: Kramers wall gone (J'^2=+1 certificate); generations openly reachable; hyperbolic pairing survives. Everything else must be ported: GR cancellation identity, QM toy, COSMO projector, SM chain arithmetic. Unknown whether the legs' machinery survives the port.

council_rounds.chairman_synthesis: Spawn both signature workers once CH-SM and CH-SRC land (their cards are inputs). Neither channel may cite the other's failure as its own success; cleanliness is scored on the criteria, and a legitimate signature verdict must explain more, not merely dodge the parity wall.

council_rounds.mode: parent integration of the seven-worker fanout
council_rounds.results_digest: CH-GR exact cancellation (K2 pending); CH-QM toy both endings + J_quat negative; CH-COSMO projector + scale pinned + sign-as-relational-readout; CH-SM 16 chains R0-equivalent + hypercharge bought + chain possibly derivable + trace-reversal retrodiction; CH-REC co-flip holds, decoupling costs one bit; CH-SRC skeleton exists B.1-B.4, 20 constraints no conflict, C2 exact; CH-SIG-77 close-path, ports survive, odd type-consistent not forced, N tie.

council_rounds.chairman_synthesis: Both signatures live, N core -> 3 in both; difference is typing and proof-debt. Weld guards: K6 purity, GRAM-PIN-77, SRC-COH-1. Scorecard updated; hourlies execute the ranked probes.

council_rounds.philosopher_guards_adopted: Pre-register K2 and real-index interpretations (both endings each) BEFORE computing; retrodictions logged as coherence never predictions; N-count accounting stays adversarial (SRC-COH-1 discipline).
council_rounds.chairman_synthesis: Housekeeping executed; next: the parallel big-swing fanout on P-77-REAL-INDEX (weighted) + P-K2, with P-T3-W229 as candidate third branch.

council_rounds.mode: parent integration of the four-probe fanout (K2, real-index builder+twin, T3 audit)
council_rounds.results_digest: K2: PARTIAL leaning theorem — artifact defeated, Ricci-flat + de Donder class is the true hypothesis, K2/K5 unified, presentation class promoted to construction data. Real-index: builder and adversarial twin UNANIMOUS on FREE-INTEGER — (7,7) neither forces nor blocks 3; wall re-enters for base-typed carriers (T4); K3 input ports but retypes (T5); lazy factorized port resurrects the quaternionic class (T2 trap). T3: W229 is a CONDITIONAL MEMBER — record direction IS the transmitted orientation, no fifth bit, N<=4 stands in (9,5); Green's-function sign is a computed consequence; GR readout anchor-invariant.
council_rounds.signature_comparison_evidence: The (7,7) fork's promised advantage (escaping the parity wall) largely evaporated: the generation integer is a free import in BOTH signatures, the wall partially re-enters via carrier base-typing, and (7,7) carries retype/proof debt (eta stability in the new AZ class, K3 KO-retype, Gram + normalization + base-typing pins). (9,5) holds audited N<=4 with native machinery. Evidence favors (9,5) + explicit generation integer; the signature VERDICT stays Joe-gated.
council_rounds.payload_state: In (9,5): one Z/2 orientation (carries Krein sign + GR cancellation sign + record direction, all three now computed/audited) + one pinned scale + one generation integer; chain datum conditionally derivable; N core = 3, ceiling 4.
new_demands: DEM-GR-3-shadow: source action derives/owns the de Donder presentation class
Weld pins if (7,7) ever advances: GRAM-PIN-77, module normalization 16-vs-32, carrier base-typing (T4), K3 KO-retype declaration (T5)
council_rounds.chairman_synthesis: The three sign-questions all resolved positive for the one-orientation picture; the generation integer is the one honest external item in either signature. Remaining queued: P-54-WELD, P-RANK-FOLD, the parked P-LATTICE-SWEEP and P-OBS-LEG, and Lane 2 packet freezes. Signature choice surfaced to Joe as evidence, not verdict.

council_rounds.mode: parent integration of the five blockbuster swings
council_rounds.results_digest: P1 DE-sign: co-variance DERIVED (readout identity exact; no phantom-mode+live-cancellation configuration exists; redefinition sweep closed); PREDICTION PACKET 1 FROZEN (w0+1>0, w(z)>=-1 pointwise; kills named; 60/40 exposed to the DESI crossing). P2 vacuum theorem: Theorem V stated with master defect law; the de Donder presentation DISCHARGED to an equation of motion (Landau limit of the gauge-fixed compensator sector — the off-class defect identity IS the BRST closure identity); two-center background passes; first nonlinear obstruction located at O(M^3) and typed. P3 one-bit dossier: 12-proposition inventory, referee ledger with standing concession, Tier-A math note weeks from submission shape. P4 generation doors: Door A excluded as pure derivation (~3%) with one gleam — the toy's 3 derives from dim Lambda^2_+ of the 4-dim base (chiralization + x2 debt remain); Door B typed as p2c demand D-77-ETA (connectedness clause converts reachable to predicted); devil's baseline 75-80% honest-external. P5 instance dossier: the bit's habitat proposed as pi_1(fiber)=Z/2 of Met(X4) (RP^3; K_S provably twists; local unreadability DERIVED from Kramers); scale slot named-and-weakest; 8 falsifiability kills; p2c buildability ladder (week/month/new-math).
council_rounds.prediction_shelf: PP1 frozen; packets 2 (matter parity) and 3 (mirror sector, weld probes W-A/W-B pending, possible mu-finite upgrade) candidates; F1 grandfathered. Standing rule active: lab/process/prediction-package-standing-rule.md.
council_rounds.chairman_synthesis: All five pathways advanced; two produced potentially publishable objects (PP1; Theorem V + Tier-A note). Route to p2c: the instance ladder + D-77-ETA. The hourlies inherit: weld probes W-A/W-B, packet 2 shaping, Theorem V's O(M^3) study, and the standing probes queue.
council_rounds.verification_note: bb_p2_vacuum_theorem_probe verification record: worker ran it four times to exit 0 / 27-27 with probe-log receipts matching the doc line-for-line; parent independent re-run reproduced Group A exactly (incl. the master-law instantiation, exact rational arithmetic) before hitting the environment background-runtime limit twice. Probe runtime exceeds the parent runner limit; full independent re-runs should use the hourly harness. No discrepancy observed anywhere.
